title: Role Foundry Task Packet
description: Schema for a curriculum task packet consumed by authoring, execution, and evaluation. Spec: 014-frontend-product-engineer-20-task-curriculum.md

task_id.description: Unique task identifier following the phase-letter + 3-digit pattern.

role_id.description: Must match the frozen role manifest id.

title.description: Human-readable task title from the spec.

objective.description: What the task is trying to achieve.

context.description: Background context the candidate needs to understand the task.

allowed_paths.description: Glob patterns for files the candidate may modify.

blocked_paths.description: Glob patterns for files the candidate must not modify.

mutation_budget.description: Override for default mutation budget. Omit to use defaults (6 files, 400 lines).

expected_checks.description: Automated checks that must pass for the task to be considered complete.

rubric_ref.description: Path to the evaluation contract used to score this task.

time_budget_minutes.description: Maximum time budget for a single run of this task.

required_checks.description: Checks that must be recorded in the receipt.

evidence_contract.description: Contract for what evidence the run must leave behind.

pass_threshold.description: Human-readable description of what constitutes a pass.

failure_interpretation.description: What a failure on this task means for the curriculum.
